roa.docketEntryComment: APD ATC TO MODIFY RESTITUTION ORDERS FILED
ADA'S ADD TO CALENDAR MOTION RE RESTITUTION STATUS FILED

/CAL:RESTITUTION DETERMINATION/DAWT/30    CAPD MISD REST REPORT, DOP/RESTRPT:09-24-18/CTORD: APD RESTITITION REPORT SHALL INCLUDE  DOCUMENTATION TO SUPPORT VICTIM'S LOSS/CONTD: MISDEMEANOR RESTITUTION REPORT FROM ADULT PROBATION IN DEPARTMENT 30/DAWF/

/TWS/CH2:ISS:CPROB:PROB 6 M:PJ 7D/CTS:7/VF2:150/COA:40/ICNA/COLLECT/OBEY/ACCEP/4019HALF/DISM3/DEF: AGREES TO WAIVE ANY EXTRADITION TO THE STATE OFCOLORADO/30    CAPD MISD REST REPORT, DOP/DEF:IS ORDERED TO REPORT TO THE ADULT PROBATION DEPARTMENT'S RESTITUTION UNIT FOR DETERMINATION OF MISDEMEANOR VICTIM RESTITUTION/RESTRPT:08-20-18/X:DEFENDANT STIPULATES TO FILING OF CR-110 NOT TO EXCEED $4000,00,  COUNSEL TO ACCEPT CR-110 FILING ON DEFENDANT'S BEHALF/CONTD:MISDEMEANOR RESTITUTION REPORT FROM ADULT PROBATION INDEPARTMENT 30/DAWF/

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/PD/DEF:IS ARRAIGNED AND PLEADS NOT GUILTY TO ALL CHARGES//X:MATTER IS RECALLED ON 13:30 CALENDAR, DEFENDANT'S NOT GUILY PLEA SET ASIDE & PLEA OF NOLO CONTENDRE IS ENTERED/MISDRED1:2/FAWC/IRRC/TEXT: DEFT WAIVES INST AND ARRAIGNMENT NL PLEA/FAWC/DEFT ADV ANNL:2/NOLO/
/CAL:INSTRUCTION & ARRAIGNMENT, PLEA & COUNSEL/NP/X:PER BAILIFF, DEFENDANT IS IN THE HOSPITAL/4011,5/CONTD I&A P&C DOP/CONTD:ARRAIGNMENT, PLEA ANDCOUNSEL/DOP/
/CAL:INSTRUCTION & ARRAIGNMENT, PLEA & COUNSEL/X:PER BAILIFF, DEFENDANT ISIN THE HOSPITAL/4011,5/CONTD I&A P&C DOP/CONTD:ARRAIGNMENT, PLEA AND COUNSEL/DOP/

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/NP/PD/X:PER BAILIFF, DEFENDANT IS IN THE HOSPITAL/4011,6/X:THE COURT DOES NOT REQUIRE A REPORT FOR 4011,6 ORDER/BAIL:100,000/X:BAIL SET WITHOUT PREJUDICE/CONTD I&A P&C DOP/CONTD:ARRAIGNMENT, PLEA AND COUNSEL/DOP/
/CAL:APD ATC TO MODIFY RESTITUTION/CTORD:MATTER OFF CALENDAR FOR THE FOLLOWING REASON: PROBATION HAS EXPIRED,COURT HAS NO AUTHORITY OVER RESTITUTION
/CAL:RESTITUTION STATUS/DAWT/X:THE GENERAL ORDER FOR VICTIM RESTITUTION FROM THE COURT ISSUED ON 10-25-18 REMAINS/
/CAL:RESTITUTION DETERMINATION/DAWT/CTORD:GENERAL ORDER FOR VICTIM RESTITUTION AS TO THE FOLLOWING VICTIMS:/X:CHARLES W & CONSTANCE L/
